creator: gabor@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hello Guido, 

I think this is a very extreme case and because of the crash involved 
it is hard to find out what the problem was. The rc.d script that amavisd 
has is a very simple one and most of the common functions are implemented 
in the rc.d framework, not in the particular rc.d script, so I think this 
problem might come up with any other daemons started by an rc.d script. 
For now, we cannot do very much without knowing the reason nor reproducing 
the problem, so I'm closing this ticket. If you can reproduce this issue 
or find out anything new, please feel free to send a follow-up and I'll 
reopen this PR. 
Thanks for your report, though! 


Regards, 
Gabor Kovesdan
